behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the constant, function name, flag string, file path, error message, class name, method name, and feature_enabled parameters that tests assert on.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements and behaviors but doesn't provide literal code; agent must write the implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for named constant, function, and method with documented API contract; alternative correct implementations meeting the spec should pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract and exec function source, mock posthoganalytics, and assert call arguments and return values.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify actual behavior: return values, feature_enabled call args (groups, group_properties, send_feature_flag_events), and specific flag string.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the constant, function behavior with/without distinct_id, feature flag delegation, and validator class method.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are organized with comment section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass) and descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output schema; error message is explicitly documented.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, flag string, and function names are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to file paths required for implementation (posthog/api/insight.py, InsightSerializer) which is scope definition, not buggy-line leakage.
